forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8480'
+title: 'Fix flaky timeout: mcp::test_utils::tests::test_client_list_tools (parallel contention)'
+---
+**File**: `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/test_utils.rs` (inside `mcp::test_utils::tests`)
+
+**Symptom**: Timed out at 300s during a full-workspace `cargo nextest run --workspace` run (observed 2026-05-21 alongside the mcp_integration timeout fix). Likely passes in isolation.
+
+**Root cause hypothesis**: Same family as the in-process MCP server contention — starts an in-process MCP server / RMCP client; under heavy parallel load (~13.7k tests) the OS port assignment / HTTP handshake / client init starves and blows the 300s nextest timeout.
+
+**Reproducer**:
+- `cargo nextest run --workspace` -> TIMEOUT [300s]
+- Confirm: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-tools -E 'test(test_client_list_tools)'`
+
+**Suggested fix**: Follow the established pattern — add `#[serial_test::serial(mcp_server)]` so it serializes with the other in-process MCP server tests. Do NOT silence with --test-threads=1.
+
+**Acceptance criteria**: full-workspace `cargo nextest run --workspace` completes with this test passing.
+
+**Pre-existing**: not caused by recent UI work on the `kanban` branch. Discovered during implementation of task 01KS3TQCM3GG44GD4419D6CVXB.
+
+#test-failure
\ No newline at end of file
